  · nlinarith [sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y, sq_nonneg z, sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x), sq_nonneg (x - 1/3), sq_nonneg (y - 1/3), sq_nonneg (z - 1/3), sq_nonneg (x - y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - z), sq_nonneg (x - y - z), sq_nonneg (x*y - y*z), sq_nonneg (y*z - z*x), sq_nonneg (z*x - x*y), sq_nonneg (3*x - 1), sq_nonneg (3*y - 1), sq_nonneg (3*z - 1)]

obtain ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩ := h₀
  have hxyz : x * y * z ≥ 0 := by positivity
  have hxy : x * y ≥ 0 := by positivity
  have hyz : y * z ≥ 0 := by positivity
  have hzx : z * x ≥ 0 := by positivity
  have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by linarith
  have hy1 : y ≤ 1 := by linarith
  have hz1 : z ≤ 1 := by linarith
  constructor
  · have : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z = 
           y * z * (1 - x) + z * x * (1 - y) + x * y * (1 - z) - x * y * z := by ring
    rw [this]
    have h1 : 1 - x = y + z := by linarith
    have h2 : 1 - y = x + z := by linarith
    have h3 : 1 - z = x + y := by linarith
    rw [h1, h2, h3]
    have : y * z * (y + z) + z * x * (x + z) + x * y * (x + y) - x * y * z = 
           y^2 * z + y * z^2 + x * z^2 + x^2 * z + x * y^2 + x^2 * y - x * y * z := by ring
    rw [this]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y, sq_nonneg z, sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x)]
  · nlinarith [sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y, sq_nonneg z, sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
               sq_nonneg (x - 1/3), sq_nonneg (y - 1/3), sq_nonneg (z - 1/3),
               sq_nonneg (3*x - 1), sq_nonneg (3*y - 1), sq_nonneg (3*z - 1),
               sq_nonneg (x + y - 2*z), sq_nonneg (y + z - 2*x), sq_nonneg (z + x - 2*y),
               sq_nonneg (x*y), sq_nonneg (y*z), sq_nonneg (z*x)]

obtain ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩ := h₀
  have hxy : x + y = 1 - z := by linarith
  have hxz : x + z = 1 - y := by linarith
  have hyz : y + z = 1 - x := by linarith
  have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by linarith
  have hy1 : y ≤ 1 := by linarith
  have hz1 : z ≤ 1 := by linarith
  constructor
  · nlinarith [sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y, sq_nonneg z, sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x), sq_nonneg (x * y), sq_nonneg (y * z), sq_nonneg (z * x)]
  · nlinarith [sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y, sq_nonneg z, sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x), sq_nonneg (x - 1/3), sq_nonneg (y - 1/3), sq_nonneg (z - 1/3), sq_nonneg (x + y - 2/3), sq_nonneg (y + z - 2/3), sq_nonneg (z + x - 2/3), sq_nonneg (3*x - 1), sq_nonneg (3*y - 1), sq_nonneg (3*z - 1)]
